examples: The soothing voice announced the arrival of an e-mail on the computer.
Tom tried again, with soothing words in his mouth, and was repulsed again.
Cold tea is very soothing for burns.
There is a charming simplicity, a soothing, serene mix of country antiques and modern bits and pieces.
That seems to be soothing stock investors in Europe where the major markets are all higher.
